query_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY event_date ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 14 DAY DELETE

metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY event_date ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY DELETE

part_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY event_date ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 14 DAY DELETE

asynchronous_metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY event_date ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY DELETE

query_views_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY event_date ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 14 DAY DELETE
